notes: Processes radioactive, fissile, and exotic element feedstocks into low- and high-grade reactor pellets, fusion fuel, superconductors, and radiation composite armor.
throughput_mult scales batch completion speed relative to the recipe's base build_time_s.
efficiency is the fraction of listed input materials consumed; values below 1.0 represent improved isotope yield and reduced waste.
All refineries in this family can process all nuclear/exotic recipes in-domain from tech 1 onward.
max_concurrent_recipes is the number of recipe slots running in parallel.
Draws electric_mw from the ship or base power bus continuously while active.
Usable at any location — orbital, surface, or microgravity habitat. No gravity requirement.
